analysis: Seven nights running above six and a half hours, with two nights hitting 7h 56m — you are not falling apart, you are actually doing this. Your REM has been genuinely good, peaking at 2h 34m on the third night and holding solid across the stretch, which means all that winding down with lavender and yin yoga is doing something real for your brain. Deep sleep has been the scrappy underdog — mostly in the 28 to 36 minute range until the last couple of nights when it climbed to 49 and 53 minutes, so that upward nudge toward the end of the week is worth noticing. The one thing to keep an eye on is that awake time creeping up mid-stretch, hitting over an hour on the seventh night — not a disaster, just your body having a loud conversation with you at 3am that you didn't ask to be part of.
